  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
  2. JavaMethodTool

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java.JavaMethodTool

Packages that use JavaMethodTool
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
Provides the concrete domain model for tools implemented as Java methods via reflection.

  • Uses of JavaMethodTool in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool

    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool that return JavaMethodTool
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JavaMethodTool
    ToolContext.getTool()
    Convenience method to get the metadata for the tool currently being executed.

  • Uses of JavaMethodTool in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java

    Subclasses with type arguments of type JavaMethodTool in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JavaMethodToolCall
    A model-agnostic representation of a request to execute a specific Java method tool.
    class 
    JavaMethodToolParameter
    A subclass of AbstractToolParameter that holds Java-specific reflection information, namely the full generic Type of the parameter.
    class 
    JavaObjectToolkit
    A domain object that parses a Java class via reflection to build a complete, self-contained Toolkit, including all its tools and parameters.
    Fields in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java with type parameters of type JavaMethodTool
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private List<JavaMethodTool>
    JavaObjectToolkit.tools
    A list of all declared methods (tools) for this toolkit.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java that return types with arguments of type JavaMethodTool
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<JavaMethodTool>
    JavaObjectToolkit.getAllTools()
    Gets all tools declared within this toolkit, regardless of their permission status.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static JavaMethodToolParameter
    JavaMethodToolParameter.of(JavaMethodTool tool, Parameter p, int index)
    The definitive factory method for creating a JavaMethodToolParameter from a reflection Parameter.
